measurement_note: Size is N, with N subscriptions overlapping 2021 and N streams outside 2021. The reference filters and deduplicates Streams once before a left anti-join, so work grows linearly. A correct correlated NOT EXISTS query on the unindexed fixture rescans all N streams for each of N subscriptions, completes every tier, and fails by quadratic scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 32 overlapping subscriptions and out-of-year streams
benchmark: 128 overlapping subscriptions and out-of-year streams
benchmark: 512 overlapping subscriptions and out-of-year streams
